name: 17. Phan tich transcript va dan chung thong qua NotebookLM

parameters.content:
## Workflow con: NotebookLM transcript analysis

Chay MCP server truoc:
`cd /Users/apple/Desktop/ex_project_8/mtips5s_mcp_ml && npm run build && node dist/index.js --transport http --port 3000 --host 127.0.0.1`

Input quan trong:
- `transcript` hoac `document_text`/`text`: noi dung can them vao NotebookLM
- `source_url`: URL de NotebookLM crawl neu khong co text
- `notebook_id` hoac `notebook_url`: notebook dich, bo trong de dung active notebook
- `question`: cau hoi tuy bien, bo trong de dung prompt phan tich mac dinh
- `source_format`: `footnotes` mac dinh, co the dung `json` de lay citations dang mang

When Executed by Another Workflow.transcript: Dat transcript hoac noi dung tai lieu vao day.
When Executed by Another Workflow.title: Tai lieu mau
When Executed by Another Workflow.goal: Tim y tuong, dan chung va cac diem co the phat trien thanh noi dung.
